description_long: This is a minimalist pendant lamp with a smooth, dome-shaped metal shade suspended from a long, slender cord. The shade is a deep matte black, with a subtle curvature that gently flares outward at the bottom edge, creating a wide opening for light distribution. The lamp's design is clean and unadorned, emphasizing functional simplicity and modern aesthetics. The cord is thin and straight, visually receding into the background to highlight the shade as the focal point. The lamp is likely intended for overhead installation, such as in kitchens, dining areas, or urban public spaces. Its understated style allows it to blend seamlessly into a variety of contemporary environments.
description: A minimalist black pendant lamp with a smooth, dome-shaped metal shade and a long, slender suspension cord. The design is modern and unadorned, ideal for overhead lighting in urban interiors.
description_view_0: Front view of the pendant lamp showing the full dome-shaped shade and the straight, centered suspension cord.
description_view_1: Side view of the lamp, revealing the consistent curvature of the shade and the vertical alignment of the cord.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, with the dome shape and cord clearly visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the other side, with the same smooth, curved shade and straight cord.
